instruction: Read Gate17 release anchor JSON/CSV/manifest, not naked latest HEAD.
Allow only report/sidecar/test successor commits with no guarded semantic changes.
Close b456129 dirty=3 and b7dbdc7 dirty=2 as superseded, not as accepted releases.
Gate2D=4, EDGE NOT_APPROVED_PREAUTH_ONLY, QCH ABSENT, BINDING FAIL_CLOSED.
Emit PASS only if anchor consumed and NODI worktree clean.
Reject Package C promotion, runtime/production, q_ch/JRC/route_score/rank/chi aliases.
